error_signature: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '# Object')
title: Error accessing binary data from Message Router
symptom: When trying to access the binary data from the Message Router after a merge node, n8n throws 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '# Object')'.
not_this_if: Error occurs without a merge node
Binary data is accessed directly from the Message Router
root_cause: The error occurs because the binary data structure is altered or lost when passing through the merge node, making it inaccessible in the subsequent nodes. The merge node may not properly handle the binary data, leading to undefined references.
fix_steps: Remove the merge node if it's not necessary
Use an IF node to handle the logic instead of merging
Access the binary data directly from the Message Router node
agent_instruction: Consider using an IF node instead of a merge node to maintain access to binary data.
